title: Can I Sort by a Date Column in Kanban view?
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have tried multiple times to sort by “Completed Date”, which is a date field, in Kanban view. No matter how I try to do this, the sort does not work. Any suggestions? 
Thanks! 
Stacey

posts.author: swilkbrooks (Stacey WilkBrooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have tried multiple times to sort by “Completed Date”, which is a date field, in Kanban view. No matter how I try to do this, the sort does not work. Any suggestions?

Thanks!
Stacey

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @swilkbrooks,

Thanks for posting about this! I’m afraid there’s no way to sort in the Kanban view, but I’ve just passed your feedback on to your team that it would be helpful to have this option.

The only way to “sort” for now would be clicking and dragging the cards so that they are in date order.

Let me know if this helps clarify!

posts.author: swilkbrooks (Stacey WilkBrooks)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We find that when you sort cards, after closing, they return to a “default” sort, thus they don’t stay sorted in the order you dragged and dropped them into.

Best,
Stacey

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
